titles.title: Give Me Oil In My Lamp

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Give me oil in my lamp Keep me burning; Give me oil in my lamp I pray. Give me oil in my lamp Keep me burning, Keep me burning'til the break of day.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Sing Hosannah! Sing Hosannah! Sing Hosannah to the King of Kings! Sing Hosannah! Sing Hosannah! Sing Hosannah! To the King!
